nasb.text: So they will make him stumble; Their own tongue is against them; All who see them will shake the head.

esv.text: They are brought to ruin, with their own tongues turned against them; all who see them will wag their heads.

cnv.text: 他們各人反被自己的舌頭所害，必然跌倒； 所有看見他們的，都必搖頭。

ccb.text: 他们必自作自受， 被自己的舌头所害。 看见的人都嘲笑他们。

csbs.text: 他们将使自己绊倒， 他们的舌头与自己作对； 所有看见他们的人都必摇头。
